name: TransactionOperationContracts
description: Concrete request, result, and stable domain-error contracts for immutable transactions and category allocation history.
schema_def: All operations use the common OperationDescriptor envelopes. Mutations require --idempotency-key.

- input: {accountId, signedAmount, currencyCode: ZAR, transactionDate, postingDate?: LocalDate, originalDescription, sourceReference?: text, provenance: {kind: manual_agent|statement_import|other, reference?: text}}

- result TransactionDetail: {transactionId, accountId, signedAmount, currencyCode, transactionDate, postingDate?, effectiveDate, originalDescription, sourceReference?, provenance, lifecycleStatus, recordedActor, recordedAt}

- errors: LEDGER-ACCOUNT-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-ACCOUNT-ARCHIVED exit6; LEDGER-MONEY-INVALID exit3; LEDGER-CURRENCY-UNSUPPORTED exit3; LEDGER-DATE-INVALID exit3; LEDGER-SOURCE-REFERENCE-CONFLICT exit5
- result: TransactionDetail plus lifecycleHistory[], allocationHistory[], relationships[] when requested
tally ledger transaction category assign / ledger.transaction.category.assign
- errors: LEDGER-TRANSACTION-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-TRANSACTION-INACTIVE exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-CATEGORY-ARCHIVED exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-ALREADY-ASSIGNED exit6
tally ledger transaction category correct / ledger.transaction.category.correct

- errors: LEDGER-TRANSACTION-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-TRANSACTION-INACTIVE exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-CATEGORY-ARCHIVED exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-NO-ACTIVE-ALLOCATION exit6; LEDGER-CATEGORY-SAME-AS-ACTIVE exit6
- input: {originalTransactionId, reason, replacement: {accountId, signedAmount, currencyCode: ZAR, transactionDate, postingDate?, originalDescription, sourceReference?, provenance}}
- errors: LEDGER-TRANSACTION-NOT-FOUND exit4; LEDGER-TRANSACTION-ALREADY-INACTIVE exit6; all ledger.transaction.record domain errors for replacement input

Constraints: provenance.kind is the same closed enum in the wire contract, domain, and persisted fact; no semantic conversion is permitted. transaction source facts never update in place; sourceReference uniqueness is scoped by account and provenance kind when present; supersession never silently transfers category allocations or financial relationships.
